name: Persona SuperPrompt
text: I am working on [goal or problem]. What persona should you assume to help me? Assume this persona and start by asking me questions.

name: Interview Me First
text: Ask me the 3 questions that would most improve your answer.

name: Multiple Choice Me
text: Give me multiple choice for simple choices, open-ended for nuance.

name: No Sugarcoat
text: Do not be sycophantic. Push back when my thinking is weak.

name: Premortem
text: Premortem this. Assume this approach failed. What were the most likely reasons?

name: HR / Mentor Me
text: Mentor me through this. Explain what a strong version requires, then coach me one step at a time.

name: Bottle That Prompt
text: Turn what worked in this conversation into a reusable prompt I can paste next time. Match the structure of my other saved prompts.

name: HR / Trust but Verify
text: Double-check this. Did the source documents or URLs actually contain that information?

name: Red Team It
text: Red-team this. What would a skeptical stakeholder, SME, or reviewer push back on?

name: Weigh the Options
text: Help me consider the options. Lay out 3 possible approaches, the tradeoffs, and when each one makes sense.

name: Decision Summary
text: Turn this into a decision summary for [audience]. Include: decision needed, recommended option, rationale, risks, owner, deadline, and open questions. Keep it under 250 words. Flag any missing information instead of guessing.

name: HR / Ship-Ready Check
text: Review this draft for readiness before it goes to [audience]. Check for: clarity, missing context, unsupported claims, tone, stakeholder risk, actionability, and decision readiness. Return: 1) Ready / not ready, 2) Top 5 fixes, 3) Questions the audience may ask, 4) Suggested edits. Draft: [paste draft]

name: HR / Retention Strategy
text: I am a [your role] at a [size]-person [industry] company experiencing [specific challenge, e.g. high voluntary turnover in engineering]. Create a retention strategy focused on [2-3 priorities]. Include specific tactics for the next 90 days.

name: HR / Focus Group Summary
text: I am attaching notes from a focus group about [topic]. Summarize the key themes in 4-5 bullet points. For each theme, include one illustrative quote if available. Audience: [senior leader who did not attend]. Flag anything that looks like a systemic risk versus a one-off concern. Keep it under 300 words.

name: HR / AI Rollout Risk
text: I am evaluating whether to pilot [AI tool or workflow] at [organization type]. What are the most significant risks? Focus on bias, legal exposure, and employee trust. For each risk: describe it briefly, note which organizations are most exposed, and suggest one practical mitigation.
